chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1583 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 24.10.2016. Mr. Shahzad Ali Mastoi, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Anwar H. Ansari, State Counsel a/w SIP Ali Bux Shar SHO P.S Daur. = Today, parawise comments are filed by official respondents, in which, inter-alia, it has been stated that FIR No.81/2016 has been lodged, wherein respondents No.1, 2 & 4 have been nominated as accused and till date only respondent No.1 could be arrested. The petitioner’s main anxiety is that the remaining private respondents, who are accused in the FIR are causing continuous harassment and extending threats to the petitioner but police officials are not providing any protection to him. Today, the learned State Counsel undertakes to provide protection to the petitioner whenever so requested and approached by him. The S.H.O P.S Daur is also present in person, who is directed to provide protection to the petitioner agaisnt any illegality that may be committed by the private respondents. Similarly, official respondents should make sincere efforts in apprehending other accused nominated in the aforesaid FIR also. With these observations, the present petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Shahid
